ddls:
CREATE TABLE "barcode_generation_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each barcode generation request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was completed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_barcode_generation_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "barcodes" (
  "barcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each barcode */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated barcode generation request */,
  "barcode_type" INTEGER /* Type of barcode generated (e.g., QR Code, UPC) */,
  "label_format" INTEGER /* File format of the generated label (e.g., PDF, PNG) */,
  "resolution" INTEGER /* Resolution of the label in DPI */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label template used */,
  "printed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the barcode has been printed */,
  "print_date" TEXT /* Date when the barcode was printed */,
  "print_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the printed barcode (e.g., good, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("barcode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_barcodes_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES label_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_barcodes_barcode_type FOREIGN KEY ("barcode_type") REFERENCES barcode_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_barcodes_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES barcode_generation_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_barcodes_resolution FOREIGN KEY ("resolution") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_barcodes_label_format FOREIGN KEY ("label_format") REFERENCES label_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address label */,
  "barcode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated barcode */,
  "address_details" TEXT /* Details of the address for the label */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the label (e.g., width x height) */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label template used */,
  "printed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the label has been printed */,
  "print_date" TEXT /* Date when the label was printed */,
  "print_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the printed label (e.g., good, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_labels_barcode_id FOREIGN KEY ("barcode_id") REFERENCES barcodes ("barcode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_labels_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES label_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "label_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "barcode_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each barcode type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the barcode type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the barcode type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the barcode type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the barcode type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "label_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the file format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the label format was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the label format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "dpi_value" INTEGER /* DPI value for the resolution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resolution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_usage_logs" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template usage log */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template that was used */,
  "used_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the template has been used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date of the last time the template was used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the usage log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)
